name: io.github.convergentmethods/arezzo
title: Arezzo
description: Deterministic Google Docs API compiler. Your agent stops silently corrupting documents.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Path to the Google OAuth2 client credentials JSON (Desktop application type, Docs API enabled). Required — the Google Docs API does not support anonymous access. Run 'arezzo init' to walk through OAuth setup and write platform config.

com.convergentmethods.tagline: Deterministic Google Docs API compiler. Your agent stops silently corrupting documents.
com.convergentmethods.fixturesClaim: 23 reproducible failure modes in the Google Docs batchUpdate API
